mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password_hash, real_name, email, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT DISTINCT u.* FROM sys_user u INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE r.role_code = #{roleCode} ORDER BY u.id ASC
